ddls:
CREATE TABLE "labor_force_data" (
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "cty_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "area" TEXT /* Name of the area or county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "total_labor_force" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals in the labor force */,
  "num_employed" INTEGER /* Total number of employed individuals */,
  "num_unemployed" INTEGER /* Total number of unemployed individuals */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Calculated unemployment rate as a percentage */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* Unique identifier combining state and county FIPS */,
  "seasonally_adjusted_rate" REAL /* Seasonally adjusted unemployment rate */,
  "annual_average" REAL /* Annual average of labor force and unemployment */,
  "quarterly_breakdown" TEXT /* Quarterly breakdown of labor force and unemployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_force_data_state_fips FOREIGN KEY ("state_fips") REFERENCES states ("state_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_force_data_cty_fips FOREIGN KEY ("cty_fips") REFERENCES counties ("cty_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "cty_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the state that the county belongs to */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* County seat of the county */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cty_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the demographic record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "num_men" INTEGER /* Number of men in the labor force */,
  "num_women" INTEGER /* Number of women in the labor force */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students in the labor force */,
  "num_retirees" INTEGER /* Number of retirees in the labor force */,
  "num_disabled" INTEGER /* Number of disabled individuals in the labor force */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the labor force */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_fips FOREIGN KEY ("state_fips") REFERENCES states ("state_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trend record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "employment_growth_rate" REAL /* Employment growth rate percentage compared to previous year */,
  "industry_growth_rate" REAL /* Industry growth rate percentage compared to previous year */,
  "sector_growth_rate" REAL /* Sector growth rate percentage compared to previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_state_fips FOREIGN KEY ("state_fips") REFERENCES states ("state_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "unemployment_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the unemployment rate record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the unemployment rate data */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the state in that year */,
  "seasonally_adjusted_rate" REAL /* Seasonally adjusted unemployment rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_rates_state_fips FOREIGN KEY ("state_fips") REFERENCES states ("state_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment type */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Sector ID that the employment type belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the employment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the job sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the job sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job sector */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry that the job sector belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "data_modified" INTEGER /* Whether data was modified during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_data" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the geographic data */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate for the geographic point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate for the geographic point */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Boundary of the geographic area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geo_data_county_fips FOREIGN KEY ("county_fips") REFERENCES counties ("cty_fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geo_data_state_fips FOREIGN KEY ("state_fips") REFERENCES states ("state_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_data" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Sector ID that the industry belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_data_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES job_sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor_force_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the indicator */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Demo ID that the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_force_indicators_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "edu_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the education level */,
  "edu_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edu_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor_force_education" (
  "edu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the education data */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Demo ID that the education data belongs to */,
  "edu_level_id" INTEGER /* Education level ID of the labor force */,
  "num_individuals" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_force_education_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_force_education_edu_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("edu_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("edu_level_id")
)
